title: malaxis rufilabris
intro: Malaxis rufilabris, also known as the red-labbed malaxis, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. The plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and digestive problems, with its roots and leaves being used in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Malaxis rufilabris include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of coughs, colds, and fever. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
